hook.summary: High-contrast text reveal of a doubled first bet offer.
hook.visual_action: Bold yellow and white text overlays flash onto a vibrant green background, followed by a smartphone mockup showing the app interface.
hook.text_overlay: 1ER PARI DOUBLÉ RECOIS JUSQU'À 100€ DE BONUS*

scene_flow: Initial offer display with '1ER PARI DOUBLÉ' and '100€ DE BONUS' text.
Transition to a smartphone mockup showing the Unibet betting interface for a football match.
Call to action 'PLACE TON 1ER PARI' appears alongside the app UI.
Explanation of the promotion: 'ON TE VERSE LA MÊME SOMME EN CRÉDITS DE JEU'.
End card featuring the App Store listing and a 'JE TÉLÉCHARGE' button.
on_screen_text: ON TE VERSE LA MÊME SOMME EN CRÉDITS DE JEU
audience_proxy: French-speaking sports fans and casual bettors looking for a high-value welcome incentive.
